top.contains: Solid blue background featuring the Amazon Prime logo (white text and smile) and a magenta bar with the text 'LOGO 50% DEPTH OF CONTAINER'.

left.contains: Vertical bars: a yellow bar on the top (y=0 to y=605) containing the text 'CONTAINER 25% DEPTH OF AD', and a magenta bar from y=605 to the bottom edge containing the text '5% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BORDER SIZE'.

frameAnalysis.corners: Amazon Prime logo with a magenta placeholder text bar is at the top-center, above the art zone. Magenta text bars are in the top-left (y=605 corner) and bottom-left, within the yellow left bar.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Place the main hero and critical narrative art within the central area, focusing detail around y=900 to y=1500 (relative to the cutout). Avoid placing important elements like titles or faces near the top edge (y=0-100) and left edge (x=0-100) of the art zone to prevent overlap with the frame's text elements.

frameInstructions: Place the main hero and critical narrative art within the central area, focusing detail around y=900 to y=1500 (relative to the cutout). Avoid placing important elements like titles or faces near the top edge (y=0-100) and left edge (x=0-100) of the art zone to prevent overlap with the frame's text elements.
